description: Review manifest for reaction equation candidates extracted from textbook markdown. Each entry maps a stable candidateId to an include or exclude decision. This manifest is an ingestion artifact; it must not be imported by runtime app code.

duplicatePolicy.description: One runtime game record per normalized equation. Duplicate occurrences of the same normalized equation across textbooks or sections are merged into a single runtime record with combined sourceRefs and sourceReferences.

allowedDecisionCodes.description: Sorted list of recognized review decisions. Any entry with an unrecognized decision causes validation to fail closed.

decisionSemantics.include: Candidate represents a valid, parseable chemical reaction equation suitable for runtime game use. May include reviewer overrides for name, description, curriculumTags, difficulty, reactants, products, or normalizedEquation.
decisionSemantics.exclude_duplicate: Candidate is a duplicate of an already-reviewed equation with the same normalized form. The canonical occurrence should be marked include; this one is excluded and its source reference merged into the canonical record.
decisionSemantics.exclude_ambiguous_equation: Candidate equation text is ambiguous or underspecified (e.g., missing stoichiometry, unclear products, or multiple plausible interpretations).
decisionSemantics.exclude_not_reaction: Candidate is not a chemical reaction equation (e.g., physical property statement, mathematical derivation, or thermodynamic expression without reactants and products).
decisionSemantics.exclude_unsupported_notation: Candidate uses notation that the current parser or game engine cannot represent (e.g., complex organic mechanisms, non-standard arrows, or unsupported state symbols).
decisionSemantics.exclude_incomplete_exercise: Candidate is an incomplete exercise prompt or fill-in-the-blank that cannot stand alone as a game reaction record.
decisionSemantics.exclude_word_only: Candidate contains only a descriptive word or phrase without an actual equation.
decisionSemantics.exclude_outside_markdown_text: Candidate originates from content outside the main markdown text flow (e.g., figure caption, table cell, or footnote) and lacks sufficient context for a standalone game record.

reviewerOverrideFields.description: Fields that a reviewer may override when decision is include. All overrides are optional.
